creator: polizzi_ken@hotmail.com
text:
Freebsd hang at startup while trying to install it.
It hangs just after ehci0 [GIANT LOCKED]
I had this problem with all FreeBSD installer CD post 5.2 version. 
5.2 works fine. 
Maybe a problem with CD Loader 1.2 ?
I tried all BIOS configurations, ACPI disabled / enabled, same issue.
Hope it'll help.


Here is the laptop configuration (standard) :
